title: paquerina graminea
intro: Paquerina graminea, also known as the Wild Germander, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of ursolic acid and carnosic acid. The health benefits of Paquerina graminea include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Paquerina graminea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
